Payout Policy Overview, Best and Fastest Prop-Firm Payouts

February 22, 2026

Table of contents

Payout Policy Overview, Best and Fastest Prop-Firm Payouts

MyFunded Futures Payout Policy

We’ve made payouts fast, simple, and structured to reward strong performance across all plan types.

Instant Payout Approvals

MyFunded Futures is proud to announce that most payout requests are approved instantly!

Rapid Plan Payouts

- Payout Frequency: Daily

- First payout eligible 24 hours after first trade (buffer & minimum profit required)

- Required Buffer:

- 50k Rapid - $2,100

- 100k Rapid - $3,100

- 150k Rapid - $4,600

- No consistency rules

- Minimum withdrawal after buffer: $500

- Payout processing time: Most payouts are approved instantly. If a manual review is required, processing may take up to six to 12 business hours on weekdays.

Take the Rapid Challenge

Flex Plan Payouts

- Earn up to $3,000 on 25k Flex Plan or up to $5,000 on 50k Flex Plan. 

- Request a payout after 5 winning days with at least:

- $100 net profit per day on the 25k Flex Plan

- $150 net profit per day on the 50k Flex Plan 

- Minimum withdrawal: $250

- Maximum request per request:

- 25k Plan - 50% of your net profits up to $3,000

- 50k Plan - 50% of your net profits up to $5,000

- After your first payout, the Max Loss Limit resets to $100

- Payout processing time: Most payouts are approved instantly. If a manual review is required, processing may take up to 6–12 business hours on weekdays.
​

Take the Flex Challenge

Pro Plan Payouts / Including 1Day Add-On

- Request up to $100,000 (per user)

- Request a payout every 14 calendar days from your first trade

- Subject to inactivity rule

- Must meet the buffer target before requesting a payout:

- 50k Pro. - $2,100

- 100k Pro - $3,100

- 150k Pro - $4,600

- Withdrawal While in Buffer: You can withdraw up to 60% of your profits before fully clearing the buffer.

- Minimum withdrawal: $1,000

- Maximum Request in Sim-Funded stage: $100,000

- Payout processing time: Most payouts are approved instantly. If a manual review is required, processing may take up to 6–12 business hours on weekdays.

Take the Pro Challenge

Profit Split Structure

- Flex and Pro Plans:

- Earn 80% of all profits.

- Rapid Plans:

- Earn 90% for Rapid sim funded plans as of January 12th, 2026
Payouts are request-based and follow the plan-specific timing and requirements.

Account Lifecycle and Live Transition

Rapid Plans

- Transition to a Live Account after: 

- $10,000 net profit achieved in a single trading day (automatic transition)

- Consistent payout performance reviewed and approved by our Risk Management Team

Flex Plans

- Transition to a Live Account after:

- 5 consecutive payouts

- Reaching the total sim cap of $100k

- Consistent performance in sim funded account (Discretion of the Risk Management Team)

Pro Plans

- Reviewed for Live Account transition after:

- 3 consecutive payouts, or

- $20,000 profit milestone

- Risk team may also fast-track based on performance

- Excess profits beyond $100,000 Sim cap may be transitioned to Live (up to plan-specific limits)

Why Choose MyFunded Futures

- No daily loss limits on Flex, Rapid or Pro plans

- Transparent, rules-based payout system

- Fastest futures prop-firm payouts available

- Real progression path from Sim to Live accounts

- Trusted by over 70,000 traders

💡 Pro-tip: We frequently give out discounts to help traders start out with ease! Stay updated with MyFunded Futures coupon codes.
